codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior scrutiny blockers. Product and event detail badges now derive from seeded per-record trust flags, the main account landing page now includes trust/support coverage, and the user-testing library now documents the guest-browsing boundary accurately. I did not find any remaining blocking or non-blocking issues in scope for this fix.

summary: Scrutiny passed. The fix resolves the original failures by making trust badges conditional on real item flags, extending trust/support messaging to the main account surface, updating the user-testing library for public guest routes, and including agent-browser evidence in the handoff.
